name: sa-explorer
description: SA Explorer - Star Atlas Fleet Fees Analyzer

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.copy-assets: cp frontend/src/index.html dist/frontend/ && cp -r frontend/src/assets/* dist/frontend/ && cp -r frontend/src/styles dist/frontend/ && cp frontend/src/config/* dist/frontend/ && cp config/rpc-pool*.json dist/frontend/
scripts.build-css: npm run split-css && npm run verify-css
